Patch Set 1:

I reproduced LU-18416 locally:
	$LFS setstripe -E128M -c1 -Eeof -c2 $tf
	replay_barrier mds1
	touch $tf
	local cmd="Ow$((1024*1024))_"
	local i
	for ((i = 0; i < 36; i++)); do
		cmd+="w$((4*1024*1024))"
	done
	$MULTIOP $tf "$cmd" &
	local PID=$!
	sleep 0.3
	fail mds1
	cancel_lru_locks mdc
	kill -USR1 $PID
	wait $PID

multiop reports:
short write: 0/4194304
short write: 0/4194304

Patch Set 1:

(1 comment)

Patch Set 1:

It looks like there isn't a field for the layout generation in lov_foreign_md, but there is one in the lov_comp_md_entry_v1, which is important for PCC-RO that has embedded foreign components, so the current or proposed patches that handle composite layouts first.

Patch Set 1:

> Patch Set 1:
> 
> It looks like there isn't a field for the layout generation in lov_foreign_md, but there is one in the lov_comp_md_entry_v1, which is important for PCC-RO that has embedded foreign components, so the current or proposed patches that handle composite layouts first.

sorry, I don't get the last statement. where to get generation for foreign layouts from?

Patch Set 1:

The generation would come from the component entry that has the embedded foreign layout in it. With PCC-RO there is a FLR "mirror" that links to a local file in the PCC cache. It is desirable to do the same with "mirrors" on S3 or other HSM archives, instead of handling this in a separate HSM xattr.
Uploaded patch set 2.

commit.subject: LU-18435 lod: recover layout generation from replay
commit.message:
LU-18435 lod: recover layout generation from replay

The offset of the layout generation is different between struct
lov_mds_md_v1/v3.lmm_layout_gen and lov_comp_md.lcm_layout_gen.
When checking/setting layout gen, we must use layout-specific field.

Otherwise layout generation can be set to 0 (or other random value)
after replay and client can't apply new layout during later update.

Fixes: 13557aa86904 ("LU-15300 mdt: refresh LOVEA with LL granted")
Signed-off-by: Alex Zhuravlev <bzzz@whamcloud.com>
Change-Id: I5e4a63cd097d157317e0e8d1a0fca4a46817d118
Reviewed-on: https://review.whamcloud.com/c/fs/lustre-release/+/56950
Reviewed-by: Oleg Drokin <green@whamcloud.com>
Reviewed-by: Qian Yingjin <qian@ddn.com>
Reviewed-by: Alexey Lyashkov <alexey.lyashkov@hpe.com>
Tested-by: jenkins <devops@whamcloud.com>
Tested-by: Maloo <maloo@whamcloud.com>
